entries.snippet: ajiwo has 11 repositories available. Follow their code on GitHub.

entries.title: modulove/SCOPE: HAGIWO simple Arduino-based OLED  - GitHub
entries.snippet: HAGIWO simple Arduino-based OLED Display Eurorack module - modulove/SCOPE.

entries.title: A MCP4821 version of Hagiwo Quantizer - GitHub
entries.snippet: This is a version of Hagiwo Quantizer with a MCP4821 12 bit DAC. The code is still under review. Using the new DAC I have to check calibration.

entries.title: Hagiwo Modulove // Alt Firmware - GitHub Pages
entries.snippet: This page is a collection of the alternate firmware for the Modulove.io hardware remixes of Hagiwo's SyncLFO and A-RYTH-MATIK modules with firmware written by ...

entries.title: modulove - GitHub
entries.snippet: Welcome to the MOD2 Workshop repository – a collection of Firmwares for Hagiwo's MOD2 module, new different firmware versions contributed by fellow enthusiasts.

entries.title: ijnekenamay/HAGIWOs_Module: eurorack modular  - GitHub
entries.snippet: The purpose of this is to PCB the project that HAGIWO is working on. The Kicad project files, including the circuit and panel designs, are now available.

entries.title: Testbild-synth - GitHub
entries.snippet: A through-hole PCB conversion of HAGIWO's 6 channel eurorack gate sequencer. Includes Gerbers, Code and building instructions.

entries.title: SyncLFO :: Hagiwo Modulove // Alt Firmware
entries.snippet: This envelope generator has several modes and curve algorithms. AR mode will simply rise and fall based on the attack and release times set.

entries.title: Open-source implementation of AlphaEvolve - GitHub
entries.snippet: Open-source implementation of AlphaEvolve. Contribute to algorithmicsuperintelligence/openevolve development by creating an account on GitHub. Missing: Agiwo | Show results with: Agiwo
